title: Move Your Body, Free Your Mind
description: A fulfilled life requires balance between movement and stillness, between physical vitality and mental clarity.
author: Daily Yogi

title: Replace Them with Good Ones
description: A well-established principle of Yogi mental training, as explained by Yogi Ramacharaka, is that "a bad habit of thought or action is more easily eradicated by replacing it with a good habit—one that is directly opposed to the habit you desire to eliminate."
author: Daily Yogi

title: You Are like a Plant
description: If you are able to honor these four pillars of health – fresh air, sunlight, water, and nourishing food – you’ll align yourself with nature's wisdom.
author: Daily Yogi
